headline: Paper accepted at ICML 2026
body: Our paper on efficient neural architecture search has been accepted at ICML 2026. Congratulations to Alice and Bob!

headline: Carol joins the lab as a postdoc
body: We welcome Carol Nguyen to the lab. Carol completed her PhD at Another University and will be working on NLP projects.

headline: Best Paper Award at NeurIPS Workshop
body: Our work on robust optimization received the best paper award at the NeurIPS Optimization Workshop.

headline: New NSF grant awarded
body: The lab has received a new NSF grant to study scalable methods for scientific machine learning. We are hiring!

headline: Eva defends her PhD dissertation
body: Congratulations to Eva Martinez on successfully defending her PhD dissertation! Eva will join Big Tech Co. as a Research Scientist.
